backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the ICDex grid trading bot with persistent config, order management, activity logging, and timer-based grid execution against the ICDex canister.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an older schema to a newer one by adding an empty activityLog queue field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — ActivityLogPanel component and its App.tsx integration — to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, footer, and a responsive grid containing all panels including the new ActivityLogPanel alongside TradeHistoryPanel.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Dashboard panel that displays the bot activity log with color-coded event type badges, relative timestamps, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and auto-refresh via the useActivityLog hook.
Renders the bot control UI with start/stop buttons, displays bot running status, estimated grid capital requirements, and recent order errors with dismiss functionality.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Provides a form panel for viewing and updating bot configuration fields (interval, spread, numOrders) with validation, loading state, and save success feedback.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a scrollable table of the latest grid orders (buys and sells) sorted by price, with loading skeletons, refresh button, and empty state messaging.
Shows the current ICP/ckUSDT mid-price fetched from the backend, with live/stale/error status badges, relative timestamp, and a manual refresh button.
Displays a scrollable list of currently open exchange orders grouped by buy/sell side, with price/quantity formatting, refresh control, and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: React component that displays a sorted trade history list with price/quantity formatting, relative timestamps, and order status badges (open/filled/cancelled), polling data via the useTradeHistory hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for polling backend data (bot status, config, prices, orders, trade history, activity log) and derives recent order cancellation errors from trade history.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, configures Tailwind base layers, and defines a dark terminal-themed design system using OKLCH CSS custom properties for colors, scrollbars, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (terminal buy/sell/neutral), custom box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of an ICP trading bot project, including deployed canister ID, architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and pending feature requests for an activity log system.
